title: penstemon auricomus
intro:
Penstemon auricomus, also known as the Bearded Penstemon or Golden Bearded Penstemon, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Penstemon genus, characterized by its distinctive bearded flowers and a range of colors including yellow and orange.

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. These properties are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and relieving respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Penstemon auricomus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
